First visit the official website of the college. Then click on the Apply Now tab. Then select the course and fill out the application form. Submit the application form with the relevant information.

faqs.question: Is STI - Srimati Techno Institute a good college/Institute?
faqs.answer: STI - Srimati Techno Institute is a well-known institution for B.Sc, Certificate, PG Diploma, M.Sc, UG Diploma, M.A, After 10th Diploma courses. These programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. As per Shiksha's verified reviews, STI - Srimati Techno Institute has a rating of 3.8 on the basis of Shiksha-verified reviews by students. Not just this, it has also been rated 3 on Campus Life, 4 on Placements, 4 on Faculty and 4 on Infrastructure.

faqs.answer: The fees range for courses offerred by the STI - Srimati Techno Institute is around INR 8500 - INR 214000.

fees_and_eligibility.overview: STI - Srimati Techno Institute is an institute which offers various courses at UG and PG levels. Students can choose Full Time and Part Time programmes from streams such as Engineering, Business & Management Studies and IT & Software. At the UG level, students can choose the available programmes such as B.Sc. and UG Diploma. Talking about PG level, some of the available courses include M.Sc., PG Diploma and M.A. The fee structure for the STI - Srimati Techno Institute programmes is around INR 8,500 to 2,14,000.

faqs.answer: A:    STI - Srimati Techno Institute is a good institution for B.Sc, Certificate, PG Diploma, M.Sc, UG Diploma, M.A, After 10th Diploma courses, and these programs are delivered by highly experienced faculty. Major specialisation at STI - Srimati Techno Institute are Environmental Sciences, .NET, Android, Electrical Engineering, HTML & CSS, C / C+, Java, Photoshop, PHP, Environmental Engineering, Python, Relational DBMS, Makeup & Beautician, Fire & Safety Engineering, AutoCAD,  3DS Max, Multimedia & Digital Media, Hair Styling & Grooming, Fashion Management.
faqs.question: What specializations do STI - Srimati Techno Institute offer in their courses?

faqs.answer: A:    STI - Srimati Techno Institute provides programmes including B.Sc, Certificate, PG Diploma, M.Sc, UG Diploma, M.A, After 10th Diploma in streams such as Science, IT & Software, Engineering, Animation, Design, Beauty & Fitness, Accounting & Commerce, Business & Management Studies, and are excellent for students to build their careers. The institute has specializations in Environmental Sciences, .NET, Android, Electrical Engineering, HTML & CSS, C / C+, Java, Photoshop, PHP, Environmental Engineering, Python, Relational DBMS, Makeup & Beautician, Fire & Safety Engineering, AutoCAD,  3DS Max, Multimedia & Digital Media, Hair Styling & Grooming, Fashion Management.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Fashion Designing and Management - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: You can make your career in fashion designing at a minimum cost, with good faculty and placement.

review_content.Placements: About 60% of students are placed in our college. More than 90% of our seniors are placed. You will get a chance to join as an assistant designer and also there are several other posts offered for an intern. Different companies came here for recruiting like Crown, Manish Fashion House, etc.
review_content.Infrastructure: Everything is available on the college campus like Wi-Fi, a computer lab, a stitching lab, a well-furnished classroom that is appropriate for fashion, and also there is a fashion lab where garments are constructed practically. There is no hostel on the college campus but you can stay in PG outside of the college.

reviews_list.batch_info: Advance Professional Program in Interior Design (Autonomous) - Batch of 2023
reviews_list.review_title: It is the best place for interior designing.

review_content.Placements: The lowest package for the interior designer course is 78,000, and the highest package for this course is 1,50,000. Yes, top recruiting companies include this institute. The course and money were worth it as I had good exposure and learning from the college. The placement process was very good.
review_content.Infrastructure: Yes, the college has all necessary infrastructure, faculties, and equipment. The quality techniques were great. Teachers had good knowledge and were always ready to help. The campus was really clean and hygienic. The location was nice and safe. Yes, it can handle emergencies as it has everything.

overview_faqs.question: When was Srimati Techno Institute established?
overview_faqs.answer: Srimati Techno Institute earlier known as National Techno Institution was established in 1989 and is ISO (International Organization for Standardization) certified. Srimati Techno Institute is affiliated with the West Bengal State Council of Technical and Vocational Education & Skill Development, Government of West Bengal.

paragraphs: Admission at STI - Srimati Techno Institute are both merit and entrance-based as per the course. Students are offered programmes at UG, PG, After 10th and Certificate level. These courses are offered in full time mode. To get admission inSTI - Srimati Techno Institute, students must meet the eligibility. The applications are accepted online. Some of the accepted entrance tests include ICSE, ISC, and WBBSE, and more. For merit-based admissions, scores in last qualifying exam are the criteria. overview_faqs.question: What is the fees for various courses at Jagannath University Haryana?
overview_faqs.answer: As it is a private university fees of this university may be higher as compared to several Government university.For any bachelor/undergraduate programs like B.Tech, BBA, BCA, etc. the fees ranges from Rs.60,000 to Rs.1,20,000 and for master degree programme like M.Tech, MBA, MCA, etc. the fees ranges from Rs.80,000 to Rs.2,00000. It is the approximate fees of these course, You are adviced to contact with the college reception to get the exact fees structure of the different courses.The fees for professional courses like B.Tech, MBA tend to be higher than general degree courses, and there is a hike in fees of this university every year. If any students need to opt any hostel and mess facilitues they have to pay extra for that as they state to pay them.

overview_faqs.question: How good is Jagannath University Haryana?
overview_faqs.answer: As per the NIRF report, Jagannath University placement percentage is between 75-80%. Jagannath University has been accredited with Grade 'B' by the National Assessment and Accreditation Council and is also a member of the Association of Indian Universities. The eligibility criteria for admission to this University is 10+2 examination with Physics and Mathematics as compulsory subjects along with one of the Chemistry /Biotechnology / Biology / Technical Vocational subjects. Students must obtain at least 45% marks (40% in the case of candidates belonging to the SC/ST category) in the above subjects taken together.The average salary package offered here is 5.50 Lakhs to 4.80 Lakhs per annum. Top recruiters are - Kotak Mahindra Bank, Development Consultant, Arkiplan International etc.

review_summary.college_name: Jagannath University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2027
individual_reviews.title: The college infra and all things are good but canteen and hostel food is below average

content.Placements: The placement is average. The highest package is 14 lakh, the lowest package is of 3 lakh and the average package in this university is 4 to 6 lakh. Also paid or unpaid internships are offered that are held by the university or if anyone want to outside from campus they can also try that.
content.Infrastructure: The infra is good and labs are average in this university. There is free unlimited Wi-Fi, modern labs and a library in which we can issue books to use.
content.Faculty: Faculty is much better than other departments. They are supportive and their teaching is good. They use different methods and we all have to study in a good manner. All the faculty members are well qualified. The semester exams are not that hard and the pass percentage is 40.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharm.) - Batch of 2024
individual_reviews.title: A bachelor's degree in my life.

content.Placements: Students who score above 60% and get marks in the first division are placed easily. Students get hired by companies like Dr. JRK Research, Belco Pharma, etc. The highest package ranges from 3-4 LPA and the lowest package ranges from 1.5-2 LPA. Internships are provided by Arbro Pharma and ACPL.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is good. It has a Wi-Fi campus, AC classrooms, smart classes, and well-furnished labs for every subject. The canteen and Nestled cafeteria are provided on the campus. Annual sports are also organised at the university level every year.

individual_reviews.course: Integrated B.A. + B.Ed. - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Fair exams and studies, but dissatisfied because of no activities and opportunities.

content.Placements: The University regularly organizes placement drives, offering opportunities in various sectors like IT, management, engineering, and more. But not all courses get these opportunities. In my course, they don't even provide us with schools for internships. We are just given the internship letter to go to a school of our choice.

They neither have novels nor course-related books. Hostel food is okay. No AC in the hostels. Recently, they put coolers after so many complaints from students.

faqs.question: When will CAT results be announced for MBA admission?
faqs.answer: Common Admission is a national-level MBA entrance exam to get admission into Indian B-Schools. CAT registration takes place in August and it ends in September. Usually, admit cards are released in October and the exam takes place in November every year. Results are declared by January. Based on CAT results, students can apply to multiple B-Schools.

faqs.question: When will Jagannath University cutoff release?
faqs.answer: Jagannath University will release its admission cutoff based on the entrance examination it conducts, the Jagan Nath University Entrance Test (JUEE) or the Common University Entrance Test (CUET), whichever is applicable for your program. The university will then release its own cutoff list on its official website.

faqs.question: How is BTech admission process in Jagannath University Haryana 2025?
faqs.answer: Jagannath University BTech admission process 2025 is simple. First you check eligibility that is if you have passed Class 12 with PCM and atleast 45%. Then, apply through JEE, CUET or JUEE or also directly based on merit. The merit scored in the qualifying exam is considered. After that, fill application form online to start the process. If selected, attend counselling and finish document verification in campus.

faqs.question: What is the selection criteria for MBA admission at Jagannath University, Haryana in 2025?
faqs.answer: Selection Criteria for MBA programme at Jagannath University, Haryana in 2025 is based on a candidate's performance in entrance exams such asCAT, MAT, XAT, CMAT, ATMA, orCUET-PG. Applicants must also meet theminimum eligibility requirement of 50% aggregate marks in their UG. Admissions are conducted primarily on afirst-come, first-served basis.So early application is advisable.

placement_data.title: Jagannath University Placement Overview 2023
paragraphs: The University has not released the 2023 placement statistics yet. However, the NIRF report 2023 has been released. As per the report, 218 UG and 84 PG students were placed during Jagannath University Bahadurgarh placements 2022. The median package offered to UG (4-year) students was INR 3.65 LPA. For UG (3-year) and U (5-year) courses, the median package stood at INR 3.05 LPA and INR 3.35 LPA , respectively. On the other hand, the median package for PG courses ranged between INR 3.70 LPA and INR 4.15 LPA during Jagannath University placements 2022 .

hostel.description: The hostel rooms are spacious, well furnished and are provided with 24 hours internet facility, electricity and water supply. WI-FI facility for hostel residents is provided round the clock for easy access of information and studies. Gym and Mess facilities are also available in hostels.

library.description: Fully air-conditioned laboratory computerized using DELNET and MANUPATRA membership. The library has a special collection of prescribed textbooks called ‘Book Bank’. The library provides the latest research and reference material in print and audio-visual formats along with the facility to refer to e-journals, CDs, Project Reports, Government Publications, Reports and Newsletters. The library is being strengthened through digitization to provide access to MOOC and other online courses.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Tennis Court, Volley Ball Court, Table Tennis Room, Athletics Tracks, Hockey Field, Chess and Carom Room

reviews.review_heading: The college infra and all things are good but canteen and hostel food is below average
reviews.review_text: The infra is good and labs are average in this university. There is free unlimited Wi-Fi, modern labs and a library in which we can issue books to use.

reviews.review_heading: A bachelor's degree in my life.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good. It has a Wi-Fi campus, AC classrooms, smart classes, and well-furnished labs for every subject. The canteen and Nestled cafeteria are provided on the campus. Annual sports are also organised at the university level every year.

reviews.review_heading: The education is good, but the infrastructure could be more good.
reviews.review_text: In my BPT course, we design machines related to our course, along with an OPD and labs for different subjects, such as the exercise therapy lab and anatomy lab. The college provides well-equipped hostels for both girls and boys, and there is a mess that provides three meals a day and snacks in the evening. The university annually organizes a sports meet, which lasts for three continuous days for intra-university students, along with various games.

reviews.review_heading: Jagannath - The best college.
reviews.review_text: College infrastructure is very good and reliable for both students and teachers. Our faculty members of Jagannath are very helpful and friendly with us. They help us a lot in our studies and even give us extra classes. I didn't opt for the hostel.

reviews.review_heading: Fair exams and studies, but dissatisfied because of no activities and opportunities.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi is not strong. The labs are okay and properly equipped. Classrooms have ACs that never work. The library never has the books needed. They neither have novels nor course-related books. Hostel food is okay. No AC in the hostels. Recently, they put coolers after so many complaints from students.

reviews.review_heading: JNU Jhajjar details about MPT course.
reviews.review_text: All facilities are available, including classrooms, laboratories, libraries, gyms, swimming pools, and Wi-Fi. The quality of the food in the mess is just okay, not great. Medical facilities are good; there are many labs for physiotherapy treatment. Sports and games are held annually there at the university.

reviews.review_heading: Life at Jagan Nath University.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the university is large enough. There are different buildings for the different courses. The classrooms are also good for 80–85 students. Wi-Fi is available in every corner of the university. The library is on two floors and around 900–1200 books are available in the library. The hostel facility is also available at the university and there are different buildings for girls and boys hostels. The food is good and they give 4 meals a day to the students that live in the hoste...

reviews.review_heading: I am very satisfied with faculty members of this college.
reviews.review_text: Hostel rooms are clean and the environment is also good. The food provided by the hostel staff is quite impressive and tasty. Cleaners are provided to clean the rooms before the students get back to the hostel. Warden of the hostel is good and very friendly with students.

reviews.review_heading: It is fruitful for a UG student due to its moderate fee structure.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure and facilities available on the campus are good. The campus has 3 labs and 1 library, and you can spend most of the time in the library and labs because students are allowed to avail it anytime. The college is far from Delhi, so it is very hectic for one to travel on a daily basis, but you can reside in the hostel provided.

reviews.review_heading: Review of Jagannath University Bahadurgarh.
reviews.review_text: Wi-Fi facility rarely worked on the campus, and we almost complained about it every day, and there was no response. Classrooms were good and well-designed, but the orientation of the structure is too bad. The campus is air-conditioned. Taking a journey for hours from Delhi to study is still a nightmare.

reviews.review_heading: I don't want to say anything.
reviews.review_text: No this university not provide us anything. They have a computer lab but without a computer they taking a designing classes but without a software also have a camera without a sensor. But faculty is too good no doubt on that part seriously they are the Best.

reviews.review_heading: Jagannath university is best for education.
reviews.review_text: Entire college is connected to a Wi-Fi network. All classrooms are fully air conditioned. And has also got a big sports ground with facility of all the sports and their is a gym also for fitness lovers. In the canteen the quality and taste of food is very good. And the hostels are very near to the university.

reviews.review_heading: Fully satisfied because of opportunities provided on-campus.
reviews.review_text: The campus is fully enabled with Wi-Fi. Labs are maintained properly as all the required labs for each department are available there. The library is always open for students, and even students have their library cards with which they can get books for some days. Quality food is served at the canteen. Infrastructure is very good.

reviews.review_heading: Once we were dissatisfied with them.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of campus is nice. They have two buildings in that they have separate department for course and cafeteria. Ground for volleyball. Basketball cricket n many more. They have a very nice hostel with good food n good facilities nice labs.

reviews.review_heading: Study is good in college.
reviews.review_text: All over building is okay. Classrooms are normal same as government colleges. Library is good. We get all the books which we required related to subjects. There is AC also in computer lab and library. There are two Computer lab. Quality is good. Canteen is not good. Only Small dairy products are there.

paragraphs: As it is a private university fees of this university may be higher as compared to several Government university.

For any bachelor/undergraduate programs like B.Tech, BBA, BCA, etc. the fees ranges from Rs.60,000 to Rs.1,20,000 and for master degree programme like M.Tech, MBA, MCA, etc. the fees ranges from Rs.80,000 to Rs.2,00000. It is the approximate fees of these course, You are adviced to contact with the college reception to get the exact fees structure of the different courses.

The fees for professional courses like B.Tech, MBA tend to be higher than general degree courses, and there is a hike in fees of this university every year. If any students need to opt any hostel and mess facilitues they have to pay extra for that as they state to pay them.
To encourage its bright students, Jagannath University offers various categories of scholarships.

The merit-based scholarships for BCom students at Jagannath University, Haryana are awarded based on the candidate's performance in the qualifying examination (Class 12). The university has a tier system:
Students securing above 90% marks in Class 12 receive a 35% tuition fee scholarship.
Those scoring between 80% and 90% are eligible for a 25% tuition fee concession.
Students with scores ranging from 70% to 80% can avail a 10% tuition fee scholarship.
Even those with marks between 60% and 70% are granted a 5% tuition fee concession.

Based on the information available on the university official website the university follows the UGC guideline to refund the fees to the students. It is mentioned in the terms and condition of the refund ploicy of the University "4.1. 3 If a student chooses to withdraw from the programme of study in which he/she is enrolled, the institution concerned shall follow the following five-tier system for the refund of fees* remitted by the student" .

reviews_list.review_title: Good college for you.

review_content.Placements: Every year, 70 percent of students are placed from our college. The highest package is 8.3 LPA and the lowest package is 1.5 LPA 3. Wipro and Infosys visit our college mostly. Average number of students who get an internship. Full-stack developer, software engineer, and other top roles are offered.
review_content.Infrastructure: Average hostel infrastructure, good Wi-Fi connection, good library, and AC classrooms. Average food facilities. No medical facilities in the hostel. Average sports fields. Field area is enough to play with friends. Good environment of college and hostel.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
reviews_list.review_title: As I recommend, you should take admission here.

review_content.Placements: Well, this college was good for getting placement, and 90% of students got placed. But somehow 10% were not getting placed because they wanted to do their business, that's why they did not attend any kind of placement. I also got placed in pharma company.
review_content.Infrastructure: Well, everything was present over there like AC laboratory lab, equipment for helping products like medicine, tablets, capsules, syrups, etc. There was also a canteen whenever you felt hungry, you could go over there and start eating snacks that helped to remove hunger.

review_summary.college_name: Sanskar Educational Group Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Mechanical Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good college.

content.Placements: Almost 70% of our students get placed every year. The highest package is 8 LPA and the lowest is 1.5 LPA. I don't know much about the companies. An average number of students get internships. Our college provides several good courses in B.Tech, BCA, Pharmacy, and other bachelor fields.
content.Infrastructure: Our college has good AC and non-AC classrooms. The behaviour of our faculty is also good, and they are supportive. Practical labs are also good. The library is well maintained. The hostel is not very good. Food service is average, and there is an electricity problem every Sunday.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good placement in college.

content.Placements: Almost 70 percent of our students are placed every year. Our highest package is 8 LPA, and the lowest is 1.5 LPA. I don't know much about the companies. The average numbers of students get internship. Our college provides several good courses in B.Tech, BCA, pharmacy, and other Bachelor's fields.
content.Infrastructure: Our college good AC and non-AC classrooms. Practical labs are also good. Well-maintained library. Hostel is not so much good. Average food service and an electricity problem every Sunday.
content.Faculty: The faculty in our college is supportive of students. Some of our faculty are too experienced. The behavior of HOD sir and the department towards students is also good. There are 2 sessional and one pre university exams held per semester from the side of. College and availability for book and notes are average. The behavior of our faculty is also good, and they are supportive.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2028
individual_reviews.title: Good college for you.

content.Placements: Every year, 70 percent of students are placed from our college. The highest package is 8.3 LPA and the lowest package is 1.5 LPA 3. Wipro and Infosys visit our college mostly. Average number of students who get an internship. Full-stack developer, software engineer, and other top roles are offered.
content.Infrastructure: Average hostel infrastructure, good Wi-Fi connection, good library, and AC classrooms. Average food facilities. No medical facilities in the hostel. Average sports fields. Field area is enough to play with friends. Good environment of college and hostel.

individual_reviews.course: Bachelor of Pharmacy (B.Pharma.) - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: As I recommend, you should take admission here.

content.Placements: Well, this college was good for getting placement, and 90% of students got placed. But somehow 10% were not getting placed because they wanted to do their business, that's why they did not attend any kind of placement. I also got placed in pharma company.
content.Infrastructure: Well, everything was present over there like AC laboratory lab, equipment for helping products like medicine, tablets, capsules, syrups, etc. There was also a canteen whenever you felt hungry, you could go over there and start eating snacks that helped to remove hunger.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science and Engineering (Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty and placements. Everything is bad.

content.Placements: College faculty members say that they provide 100% placement to students, but they give only 60%, and none of it is in the IT sector. They provide placement for B.Tech students in sales roles. The highest package is 8 LPA, the lowest is 1.5 LPA, and the average is 3.5 LPA. There are no top recruiters. All are sales companies. No one gets an internship through the college. Sales is the only role offered by the college.
content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is okay. There are a total of four buildings. One is for B.Tech 1st, 3rd, and 4th year and Diploma. The second is for B.Tech 2nd year and all management courses. The third building is for Architecture, and the fourth is for Pharmacy. They provide AC only in the first year. After that, there is no AC. There is only one canteen, and the food is very bad. Wi-Fi is available, but they never share the passwords.

admission_overview.college_name: Sanskar Educational Group Course Admission 2025: Eligibility, Selection Criteria, Application

paragraphs: Sanskar Educational Groupadmission 2025is open for various courses. The college offers various courses, such as BTech, BPharma, MBA, MTech, etc, at the UG and PG level. The selection criteria is a mix of entrance exams and merit-based as per respective courses. To get admitted to SEG, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. Apart from the UG and PG courses, the college also offers diploma programme. The application process atSanskar Educational Groupis conducted online. Read the article to know more aboutSanskar Educational Groupcourse admission2025.

Sanskar Educational Group admission 2025is a mix of merit or entrance-based. The university offers more than 10 courses in various streams such as Engineering, Pharmacy, Management, etc. The programme's mode of study is full-time. Check out the following table for details aboutSanskar Educational Group course admissions2025:
Particulars
Sanskar Educational Group Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
How to apply?
Level of programmes offered

SEG admissions are based on merit or entrance exams. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12, whereas graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. The following table mentions the eligibility and selection for some of the popularSanskar Educational Group courses:
Class 12 with a 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for the reserve category)
Class 12 with a 45% aggregate
Class 12 with a 50% aggregate with Physics, Chemistry and Mathematics (PCM) as compulsory subjects.
Graduation with a 50% aggregate
MAT/CAT/CMAT/XAT/ATMA/GMAT/CUET-PG
BCA with a 50% aggregate
CUET-PG,NIMCET, CUET,GPATandUPTAC
BPharma with a minimum 55% aggregate

Sanskar Educational Group admissionsare primarily entrance-based. Candidates can register online for admission to their preferred course. The admission process at the Sanskar Educational Group is as per the steps below:
STEP 1: Sanskar Educational Group Application Process 2025

The application mode is online. For admission to the various programmes, aspirants need to apply at the official website,https://sanskareducationalgroup.ac.in. The application fee is INR 1,000. Candidates can fill out the application form on the institute's official website.
STEP 2: Selection

The college admits students based on various national-level entrance exam scores, such as JEE Main, NATA, CAT, etc. Apart from the entrance exam scores, the college also selects candidates based on merit-based. It also considers the candidates' academic performance for the final selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Admission Confirmation

The college also releases a merit list based on the composite score of the candidates for admission. Shortlisted aspirants need to come for document verification and pay theSanskar Educational Group feeto confirm their seats at the institute.

faqs.question: How many specialisations are offered for BTech course at Sanskar Educational Group?
faqs.answer: Sanskar Educational Group offers BTech course for a duration of four-years. This course is offered across five specialisation. Find below all the BTech specialisations offered at Sanskar Educational Group:BTech – CSEBTech – CS (AI & ML)BTech – CS (Data Science)BTech – MEBTech – Civil

faqs.question: How much percentage is required for admission to BTech at Sanskar Educational Group?
faqs.answer: To get into Sanskar Educational Group for an BTech course, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the college. Students must pass Class 12 with a minimum of 45% aggregate (40% aggregate for reserve category). Sanskar Educational Group offers full-time BTech courses of four years' duration. Students can get into this course based on entrance-exam. Apart from the selection criteria, students must pass Class 12 (common eligibility).

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission for BTech at Sanskar Educational Group?
faqs.answer: For BTech course admission, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the institute. Aspirants should pass Class 12 with a minimum 45% aggregate. The admission criteria for the course is entrance-based. BTech full form is Bachelor of Technology,  a four-year professional engineering degree course at the undergraduate level. B Tech is a field related to computers and technology that provides students a detailed understanding of programming and computer software applications.

faqs.question: Is JEE Main exam compulsory for admission to BTech at Sanskar Educational Group?
faqs.answer: Yes, the JEE Main exam is compulsory for admission into BTech at Sanskar Educational Group as admission into the programme takes place through the merit secured in that entrance exam. The institute does not conduct or recognise any other entrance exam as part of the admission process of BTech at the institute. Therefore, candidates will have to make sure they appear for the exam and secure a valid score so that they can be eligible for admission into the institution.

hostel_campus.college_name: Sanskar Educational Group Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: The Institute has separate hostels for boys and girls that are fully airconditioned, networked with internet and Wi-Fi connectivity and are well facilitated with water supply, electricity, spacious rooms.

library.description: The library is unarguably the most important academic facility of any institute. SEG has 4 libraries within the campus spread over 12000 sq. ft. and houses more than 15000 books and has a subscription of 20+ monthly and annual journals and magazines. The students and staff at SEG are provided access credentials to ‘Del-Net’ which additionally opens millions of books, journals, research papers, and much more.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Cricket Ground, Football Ground, Table Tennis, Hockey, Volleyball Court, Athletics

reviews.review_heading: Good college for you.
reviews.review_text: Average hostel infrastructure, good Wi-Fi connection, good library, and AC classrooms. Average food facilities. No medical facilities in the hostel. Average sports fields. Field area is enough to play with friends. Good environment of college and hostel.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2022Offered by Sanskar College of Pharmacy and Research, Sanskar Educational GroupReviewed on 7 Jul 2025)
reviews.review_heading: As I recommend, you should take admission here.
reviews.review_text: Well, everything was present over there like AC laboratory lab, equipment for helping products like medicine, tablets, capsules, syrups, etc. There was also a canteen whenever you felt hungry, you could go over there and start eating snacks that helped to remove hunger.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sanskar College of Engineering and Technology, Sanskar Educational GroupReviewed on 24 Jun 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Absolutely dissatisfied because of faculty and placements. Everything is bad.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is okay. There are a total of four buildings. One is for B.Tech 1st, 3rd, and 4th year and Diploma. The second is for B.Tech 2nd year and all management courses. The third building is for Architecture, and the fourth is for Pharmacy. They provide AC only in the first year. After that, there is no AC. There is only one canteen, and the food is very bad. Wi-Fi is available, but they never share the passwords.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by SGIT School of Management, Sanskar Educational GroupReviewed on 14 May 2025)
reviews.review_heading: College campus is also very neat and clean and has beautiful greenery.
reviews.review_text: Our classrooms are very good with a facility for online teaching it is a great experience to study here. It has a great atmosphere here. Canteen is also very good on the college campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sanskar College of Engineering and Technology, Sanskar Educational GroupReviewed on 7 Apr 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Sanskar College of Engineering and Technology, Sanskar Educational Group.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is good and spacious but the only thing is it requires maintenance the college needs maintenance. There are 3 main buildings of college B. Teach, architecture, and the pharmacy department in which the architecture department needs maintenance. It is very bad as the walls are shredding.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sanskar College of Engineering and Technology, Sanskar Educational GroupReviewed on 25 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: The infrastructure and faculty members are good.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure is very good. Wi-Fi is available in every place on the campus. The library and classrooms are very neat and clean. The hostel facilities are awesome like rooms, washrooms, bathrooms, and sports. The mess food is not good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2026Offered by Sanskar College of Engineering and Technology, Sanskar Educational GroupReviewed on 25 Jan 2025)
reviews.review_heading: Sanskar but not the sanskar in college, so much discipline is like school.
reviews.review_text: Labs and classrooms are not good, not look like a college standard. According to the hostler, food is not good. Medical facilities are also not good. Canteen food is not good, and not provide anything. In hostel, geyser is not provided in winter.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2024Offered by Sanskar College of Engineering and Technology, Sanskar Educational GroupReviewed on 5 Oct 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Affordable with excellent faculty, modern infrastructure, and a great learning environment.
reviews.review_text: The overall facilities of the college are outstanding, and the infrastructure is always impressive. The hostel facilities are good, with well-furnished rooms that include beds, almirahs, chairs, and study tables. The food quality is also good, with a different menu for each day. Medical and sports facilities are available on campus, so there’s no need to go outside for anything.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sanskar College of Engineering and Technology, Sanskar Educational GroupReviewed on 1 Jan 2024)
reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with good faculty and infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: Hostel is good, but mess food is not good. Very good greenery. I love that the good infrastructure of the library is good, the stationery is good, and the labs are well furnished with good instruments. I also appreciate the greenery of the photoshoot place as well. Sports facilities include a cricket ground and a volleyball court.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by SGIT School of Management, Sanskar Educational GroupReviewed on 20 Jun 2023)
reviews.review_heading: I'm absolutely satisfied with the faculty members, the campus and the seniors.
reviews.review_text: The facilities given to us include a good quality screen projector and Speakers in classrooms and also 2 properly working ACs. The same is for COMPUTER LABS too. A Wi-Fi of Jio Company is also placed. The classrooms are properly maintained. The food available in the canteen is of good quality, fresh and delicious. Also, there are cameras placed all over the campus.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2023Offered by Sanskar College of Engineering and Technology, Sanskar Educational GroupReviewed on 16 May 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Our college is good in all aspects.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides very good facilities and infrastructure. Our college building is well-maintained. Classrooms are neat. Medical facilities are available in our college. The hostel is very good, clean, and well-maintained.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sanskar College of Engineering and Technology, Sanskar Educational GroupReviewed on 30 Apr 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Sanskar College of Engineering and Technology, Sanskar Educational Group.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Wi-Fi facility is available in all classrooms. We can use Wi-Fi on laptops. The library is good. The food served in the hostel is good. The hostel rooms are good.

reviews.batch: Batch of 2025Offered by Sanskar College of Engineering and Technology, Sanskar Educational GroupReviewed on 30 Apr 2023)
reviews.review_heading: Review of Sanskar College of Engineering and Technology, Sanskar Educational Group.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. Wi-Fi facility is available for students. They can use it on their laptops. Our college has classrooms and labs. Our classrooms are spacious. The library has many books. The hostel facilities are good. The food served in the mess is good. Our college has good security.

college_info.college_name: Sanskar Educational Group Scholarship Details

paragraphs: Candidates need to pay an application fee to register for a course at SGIT Institute of Management Ghaziabad. The application fee for each programme is INR 1,000. Aspirants need to pay the application fee via any of the online payment modes. Once the application fee is paid, candidates must keep the receipt for reference in future.

Yes, SGIT Institute of Management Ghaziabad provides financial aid to meritorious students in the form of scholarships. The scholarship is offered under the name of SL Gupta. The scholarship is based on the merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam. The scholarship amount ranges between INR 5,000 and INR 20,000. Candidates with score above 90% are offered a scholarship of INR 20,000.

The fee range for the MPharma programme at Sanskar Educational Group is INR 2 lakh. This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. The fee might cover various academic expenses like tuition fees, laboratory charges, examination fees, library fees, and other relevant charges. It is important to note that the fee structure is subject to change, and candidates are advised to refer to the official website of the university for the latest and most accurate fee structure.

Students are offered scholarship at SGIT Institute of Management Ghaziabad based on their score in qualifying exam or entrance exam. In case of consideration of Class 12 Boards for scholarship amount calculation, best of top 5 subjects is considered. The scholarship facility provided to student at the time of admission will be applicable on all years, as applicable for a programme.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Interior Design - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: It offers good project-based learning.

review_content.Placements: There were 10 students in our batch. As the college doesn't offer placements, the teachers helped us get a job. All the students were really good and supportive. Design has its own value.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college greenery was my favourite part. The fee structure was very nominal, and the classrooms were good enough for learning. A good library is available with great books worth reading. The labs are good with good computers. No Wi-Fi is available on campus.
review_content.Faculty: The faculty members are good, supportive and really helpful in every subject. They made learning fun with many practical projects and helped us become a better person. They also helped us in many valuable things.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Sc. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2018
reviews_list.review_title: Good placements and environment.

review_content.Placements: There were excellent opportunities provided by the placements from around the country. Every talented people are selected, and they also select the students who are possessing fewer skills are provided with low packages. The placements are conducted in the middle of the final year.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is an excellent infrastructure with good classrooms, equipment and tools etc. are available in plenty, and the latest infrastructure with large facilities are available for every student. The good environment also present in the campus. The infrastructure is imported from other countries. Excellent, marvellous and mindblowing.

The Institute has experienced faculty offering the best education to students. The college's campuslife, placements, faculty and Infrastructure has been rated as 5, 5 and 0 as per reviews by students.

overview_faqs.question: Can you elaborate on the BSc Design career?
overview_faqs.answer: Sure, the BSc Design career scope is vast, with diverse career paths based on the specialisation you choose to study. It will offer you not just the theoretical knowledge but also help you gain creative and technical skills. You can even go for freelance opportunities once you gain relevant skills and experience in the industry.

review_summary.college_name: School of Art and Design Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Interior Design - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: It offers good project-based learning.

content.Placements: There were 10 students in our batch. As the college doesn't offer placements, the teachers helped us get a job. All the students were really good and supportive. Design has its own value.
content.Infrastructure: The college greenery was my favourite part. The fee structure was very nominal, and the classrooms were good enough for learning. A good library is available with great books worth reading. The labs are good with good computers. No Wi-Fi is available on campus.
content.Faculty: The faculty members are good, supportive and really helpful in every subject. They made learning fun with many practical projects and helped us become a better person. They also helped us in many valuable things.

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. in Fashion Design - Batch of 2018
individual_reviews.title: Good placements and environment.

content.Placements: There were excellent opportunities provided by the placements from around the country. Every talented people are selected, and they also select the students who are possessing fewer skills are provided with low packages. The placements are conducted in the middle of the final year.
content.Infrastructure: There is an excellent infrastructure with good classrooms, equipment and tools etc. are available in plenty, and the latest infrastructure with large facilities are available for every student. The good environment also present in the campus. The infrastructure is imported from other countries. Excellent, marvellous and mindblowing.

college_info.intro:
Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University popular programmes are BTech and MBA. BTech and MBA students are placed in top companies for placements such as Movidu, Medi Assist, Raise Digital, and others. Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University students learn to select, create, and apply various appropriate techniques, resources, and modern engineering and IT tools, including prediction and others. BTech students can become Software Developers, Software Testers, Database Administrators, and Software Engineers, or can go for other job profiles.
Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University MBA students can become Managers, Business Analysts, or go for various other job profiles. Overall, JVWU is one of the top universities offering quality education to students. Candidates can check the popular programmes offered at JVWU Jaipur in the table provided below:

reviews_list.batch_info: MBA in Human Resource Management (HRM) - Batch of 2020
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the faculty members and good infrastructure.

review_content.Placements: The university invites good and reputed companies for the students to get apt corporate exposure. The highest salary package offered is 4.3 LPA.
review_content.Infrastructure: The university is well-equipped with the best in class infrastructure and modern classrooms for students to cope up with the dynamic environment. It provides good computers for the students to get practical exposure. It also has regular sports activities so that students will stay healthy.
review_content.Faculty: Teachers available in our college make suitable efforts in order to get the students to learn and exemplify the level of knowledge and understanding. The course curriculum is good enough to provide students with perfect corporate knowledge. They make them ready to handle every situation. The expertise of the faculty members in the university is exceptional, and the efforts made by them are also commendable.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. in Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) - Batch of 2021
reviews_list.review_title: I am satisfied with the college.

review_content.Placements: Almost 50%-60% of the students are placed in every year. Students are offered roles like software tester, data scientist, data administrator, software engineer, etc. In our course, the maximum salary offered ranges from Rs. 45,000 to 4 lacs per month. C-CORE and all big companies visit our college, and I would suggest you take admission here.
review_content.Infrastructure: Facilities in our college are very good, and the infrastructure is improved day by day. The hostel is very good and clean, and all types of rooms are available here. Mess, canteen and medical facilities are available for 24x7. The mess food was very tasty, and the Wi-Fi facility was very good.

faqs.answer: The application fee is INR 1,000 and INR 3,000 for research courses. Candidates may apply for one or more programmes by submitting separate application form along with the registration fee. Aspirants can pay the application fee via any of the online payment modes or through DD or in Cheque/ Cash.
faqs.question: Q: What is the application fee for JVWU admission?

faqs.answer: JVWU conducts Joint National Entrance Examination for admission to various UG, PG and Diploma courses. The exam is held in online mode usually in May-June. JNEE question paper includes a total of 100 objective type questions (20 G.K. Questions and 80 subject related aptitude Questions) which is to be performed in 1 hours 30 minutes. Besides, admission in BAMS and BHMS programme is through NEET score.
faqs.question: Q: What entrance exam scores are accepted by JVWU for admission?

faqs.answer: JVWU fee is a sum of various components such as one-time fee, tuition fee, hostel fee, caution deposit, etc. The fee differs specialisation-wise and also depends on the past academic score of the aspirants. faqs.question: Q: What is the fee for JVWU?

faqs.answer: JVWU admissions are offered through four modes. One is through direct admission based on the merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam. Others is via University Entrance cum Scholarship Exam (JNEE) or scholarship exam. Aspirants can also get admission via Management Quota. Candidates applying via Management Quota are evaluated based on their past academic records.

The Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University BPharm tuition fee is INR 3.2 lakh. The mentioned fee is as per the official website/sanctioning body. It is subject to changes and hence, is indicative.

review_summary.college_name: Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University Reviews on Placements, Faculty & Facilities

individual_reviews.course: B.Sc. B.Ed. in Mathematics - Batch of 2022
individual_reviews.title: Best campus for girls. Completely safe and peaceful.

content.Placements: JVWU is one of the best universities. I studied at this university for 4 years and passed out in 2022. It provides lots of opportunities for the future. It also offers both campus placements and non-campus placements. It provides recruitment in top educational companies like Byju's, Examadda, and many more. Approximately 70 to 75% of students got internships from this university.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of this university is the best. Classrooms, labs, library, activity rooms, etc., are fully furnished, neat, and clean. Hostel facilities are also available, which are also very good. Washrooms are totally clean and hygienic. As for the mess, the meals are good and tasty. Proper hygiene is maintained in the mess as well.

individual_reviews.course: B.B.A. LL.B. - Batch of 2017
individual_reviews.title: This college had good placements in 2017, and there were excellent faculty members.

content.Placements: Around 60% of the students got placed in various companies. The highest salary package offered was 3.6 LPA, and the lowest salary package offered was 1.2 LPA. The top recruiting company was My operator, and the role offered was as HR. Around 80% of the students got internships. But I think there should reputed companies also come like TCS, Axis Bank and so on who should visit the campus for recruitment.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure of the college was good. There was a lack of modern techniques of teaching like lack of digital classes, presentation, and so on. The hostel was also amazing, and we got the facility of Wi-Fi. Phones were not allowed, so I think that's why we were more indulged in our studies. Food served was also good.

individual_reviews.course: MBA in Human Resource Management (HRM) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the faculty members and good infrastructure.

content.Placements: The university invites good and reputed companies for the students to get apt corporate exposure. The highest salary package offered is 4.3 LPA.
content.Infrastructure: The university is well-equipped with the best in class infrastructure and modern classrooms for students to cope up with the dynamic environment. It provides good computers for the students to get practical exposure. It also has regular sports activities so that students will stay healthy.
content.Faculty: Teachers available in our college make suitable efforts in order to get the students to learn and exemplify the level of knowledge and understanding. The course curriculum is good enough to provide students with perfect corporate knowledge. They make them ready to handle every situation. The expertise of the faculty members in the university is exceptional, and the efforts made by them are also commendable.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) - Batch of 2021
individual_reviews.title: I am satisfied with the college.

content.Placements: Almost 50%-60% of the students are placed in every year. Students are offered roles like software tester, data scientist, data administrator, software engineer, etc. In our course, the maximum salary offered ranges from Rs. 45,000 to 4 lacs per month. C-CORE and all big companies visit our college, and I would suggest you take admission here.
content.Infrastructure: Facilities in our college are very good, and the infrastructure is improved day by day. The hostel is very good and clean, and all types of rooms are available here. Mess, canteen and medical facilities are available for 24x7. The mess food was very tasty, and the Wi-Fi facility was very good.

individual_reviews.course: B.Tech. in Computer Science (Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning) - Batch of 2020
individual_reviews.title: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, infrastructure and placement activity.

content.Placements: 50% of students get placed in our course. The highest package offered in our course is 4 Lacs p. a. and the lowest package offered is 2.3 Lacs p. a. top recruiting companies of our courses are Genus power, Core technosolutions, Appcino etc. Top roles offered in our course are data analyst, data administrator, data scientists, software developer, web developer, network analyst etc.
content.Infrastructure: University provides us best facilities in every possible way. The campus is very huge and hostel rooms are also good. Here we get 24x7 Wi-Fi, water and electricity. Mess served us good quality food and menu gets changed everyday. Talking about infrastructure of department we get facilitated by I. C. T tools, Wi-Fi is available in labs and libraries. For medical facilities we are having here homeopathy, ayurveda and allopathy hospitals.

admission_overview.college_name: Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University Admission 2025: Eligibility, Fee, Application & Selection

paragraphs: Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women’s University admissionsare both merit or entrance-based. The university offers admission direct based on merit, through the university cum scholarship exam or via scholarship exam. JVWU conducts theJNEE or Joint National Entrance Examination,for regular courses.

Candidates can also get admission through Management/ NRI Quota.JVWUoffers UG, PG, and diploma courses in multiple streams, such as Arts, Science, Management, etc. The university also offers UG and PG courses in distance education. Interested candidates can apply for admission online.

Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women’s University usually begins admission inFebruary. Candidates can fill out the application form on the official website of the university. Find below the keyJVWU admissionhighlights:
Particulars
JVWU Admission Highlights 2025
Mode of study
Programmes Offered
Admission status 2025
Ongoing:UG, PG & Diploma
How to apply?
https://jvwu.ac.in/
Level of programmes offered
Popular programmes

JVWU offers more than 50 courses at UG, PG and diploma levels. The basic eligibility for UG courses is Class 12 whereas graduation is required to apply for PG programmes. The university offers direct merit-based admission to some of the UG and PG courses. Besides, JVWU also considers scores of the candidates in national, state or university-level entrance exams. Find below the eligibility and selection criteria for topJVWU courses:

JVWU admission processbegins with registration via online mode. Candidates need to select their preferred mode of admission while filling out the application form. Below are step-wise admission details for JVWU:
STEP 1: JVWU Application Process 2025

The mode of application is both online and offline. The offline forms are attached in the prospectus. Aspirants need to pay an application fee ofINR 1,000for regular courses. The registration fee isINR 3,000for research programmes. Candidates need to pay the fee via any of the online payment modes. Besides, aspirants can also collect the form offline.
STEP 2: Selection

Once registered, candidates are selected based on their mode of admission. During application, candidates need to select whether they want direct merit-based admission, through Management Quota, University scholarship exam orJNEEexam. The university conducts a Joint National Entrance Examination for admission to some of the UG and PG specialisations. For some of the courses, the university may also conduct a personal interview round for selection.
STEP 3: Merit List & Counselling

The university releases a merit list to announce the names of the selected candidates. Besides, aspirants must come for counselling and document verification. Aspirants applying for BAMS or BHMS need to participate in NEET Counselling. Selected candidates need to pay theJVWU feeto confirm their seat in the university.

courses_data.name: JVWU BSc Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University offers a three-year BSc in various specialisations such as Nutrition and Dietetics, Zoology, Botany, Chemistry, Psychology, etc. Besides, the university also offers a four-year BSc B.Ed programme divided into eight semesters. Candidates need to pass Class 12 with PCM/ PCBM with at least 50% aggregate for BSc B.Ed.

faqs.question: What is the eligibility criteria for admission to B.Sc at Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University?
faqs.answer: For admission to a BSc programme of the Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University, aspirants must fulfil the eligibility requirements. The applications of only the students with appropriate educational qualification is treated as valid. Hence, the students who areClass 12or equivalent examination pass with PCM/PCB subjects can apply. At the time of form filling or admission, students must hold the pass certificates. These are required for verification purposes.

faqs.question: How do I get admission to B.Sc in Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University?
faqs.answer: JVWU offers direct merit-based admission to BSc programmes. Candidates can also get admission based on JNEE score or under the management quota. To be eligible for the course, the applicant must be Class 12 pass with PCM/PCB subjects. Students who meet the eligibility requirements can visit the university's official website to register and apply.

faqs.question: Are there any management quota seats for B.Sc at Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University?
faqs.answer: Yes, the Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University has seats under management quota as well. Aspirants can apply for admission under this quota if they meet the prescribed eligibility criteria. As per official website, the management seats are available for admission to all professional and technical courses. Aspirants seeking admission to a BSc course can get in touch with the university to gather more details.

faqs.question: What is the seat intake for B.Sc at Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University?
faqs.answer: There areover 100 seatsat the Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University for BSc courses. The seat allotment procedure is carried out based on selection procedure defined by the university.JVWU BSc seat intakevaries based on the chosen specialisation by the candidates. The highest seat count is for the BSc-B.Ed (Mathematics) programme, i.e.,50. It must be noted that the mentioned seat count is as per the official website/sanctioning body.

courses_data.name: JVWU BTech Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University offers full-time BTech courses for a four-year duration. The university offers BTech in Electronics & Communication Engineering andComputer Science. Besides, JVWU also offers integrated BTech + MTech/ MBA course for five years. Candidates who have passed Class 12 with Physics, Chemistry, Biology/ Mathematics can apply for the JVWU BTech programme. Admission to BTech courses is based on JNEE score. For some of the BTech specialisations, aspirants may also offer direct merit-based admission.

faqs.question: Is BTech available at JVWU?
faqs.answer: Yes, Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women’s University offers four-year BTech course spread across eight semesters. The university offers BTech in Electronics & Communication and Computer Science. The selection to BTech courses is based on JNEE score. For some of the BTech specialisations, aspirants may also offer direct merit-based admission.

faqs.question: What is the fees for BTech programmes at JVWU?
faqs.answer: The total tuition fee for JVWU BTech isINR 4 lakh.This information is sourced from official website/ sanctioning body and is subject to change. The university offers waiver in fee as per the academic percentage of the aspirants. The above fee excludes components such as hostel fee, admission fee for hostellers, etc. Aspirants have to pay some part of the fee at the time of admission to confirm their seat.

faqs.question: What entrance exam scores are accepted by JVWU for admission?
faqs.answer: JVWU conductsJoint National Entrance Examinationfor admission to various UG, PG and Diploma courses. The exam is held in online mode usually inMay-June. JNEE question paper includes a total of 100 objective type questions (20 G.K. Questions and 80 subject related aptitude Questions) which is to be performed in 1 hours 30 minutes. Besides, admission in BAMS and BHMS programme is through NEET score.

faqs.question: Can I join JVWU directly?
faqs.answer: Direct merit-based admission is one of the options to get a seat in Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women’s University courses. Candidate must have appeared Class 10/ Class 12 or graduation examination from a recognised board to get direct admission. Aspirants must check if there course is available for direct admission before applying.

faqs.question: How can I get admission in JVWU?
faqs.answer: JVWU admissionsare offered through four modes. One is through direct admission based on the merit of the candidates in the last qualifying exam. Others is via University Entrance cum Scholarship Exam (JNEE) or scholarship exam. Aspirants can also get admission via Management Quota. Candidates applying via Management Quota are evaluated based on their past academic records.

faqs.question: What is the fee for JVWU?
faqs.answer: JVWU fee is a sum of various components such as one-time fee, tuition fee, hostel fee, caution deposit, etc. The fee differs specialisation-wise and also depends on the past academic score of the aspirants. Candidates need to pay course fee to confirm their seat at the time of admission. placement_data.title: Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University Placement overview 2024
paragraphs: According to Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University overall NIRF report 2024, the median package offered during UG 3-year , UG 4-year and UG 5-year placements 2023 stood at INR 3.5 LPA , INR 4.6 LPA and INR 4.56 LPA , respectively. Further, the median package offered during PG 1-year and PG 2-year placements 2023 stood at INR 5.32 LPA and INR 4.8 LPA , respectively.

Earlier, according to the limited data available on the official placement report, the highest package offered during Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University placements 2023 stood at INR 6 LPA . Further, the top recruiter during Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University placements 2023 was Raise Digital . Apart from this, according to JVWU overall NIRF report 2023, the median package offered during Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University UG 4-year and PG 2-year placements 2022 stood at INR 4.35 LPA and INR 4.75 LPA , respectively.

hostel_campus.college_name: Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University Infrastructure Details & Reviews

hostel.description: Hostels are for Domicile of Jaipur, Ajmer & Sikar District only. Separate food is prepared daily with and without Onion. Special Food served as per the required timings during festivals for the students belonging to specific groups of Religion. Dining Hall (Mess) Facility.

library.description: Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's Universities library has a rich collection of relevant books to support students' information needs, the E-Textbooks, E-Journals and easy accessibility to various Digital Libraries like DELNET, MANUPATRA etc. University also have separate departmental libraries

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Tennis Court, Horse Ridding, Kho-Kho, Kabbadi, Volley Ball Court, Table Tennis

hostel.description: Hostels are for Domicile of Jaipur, Ajmer & Sikar District only. Separate food is prepared daily with and without Onion. Special Food served as per the required timings during festivals for the students belonging to specific groups of Religion. Dining Hall (Mess) Facility.

sports.description: Available Facilities: Badminton Court, Basketball Court, Tennis Court, Horse Ridding, Kho-Kho, Kabbadi, Volley Ball Court, Table Tennis

reviews.review_heading: Best campus for girls. Completely safe and peaceful.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of this university is the best. Classrooms, labs, library, activity rooms, etc., are fully furnished, neat, and clean. Hostel facilities are also available, which are also very good. Washrooms are totally clean and hygienic. As for the mess, the meals are good and tasty. Proper hygiene is maintained in the mess as well.

reviews.review_heading: This college had good placements in 2017, and there were excellent faculty members.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good. There was a lack of modern techniques of teaching like lack of digital classes, presentation, and so on. The hostel was also amazing, and we got the facility of Wi-Fi. Phones were not allowed, so I think that's why we were more indulged in our studies. Food served was also good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the faculty members and good infrastructure.
reviews.review_text: The university is well-equipped with the best in class infrastructure and modern classrooms for students to cope up with the dynamic environment. It provides good computers for the students to get practical exposure. It also has regular sports activities so that students will stay healthy.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the college.
reviews.review_text: Facilities in our college are very good, and the infrastructure is improved day by day. The hostel is very good and clean, and all types of rooms are available here. Mess, canteen and medical facilities are available for 24x7. The mess food was very tasty, and the Wi-Fi facility was very good.

reviews.review_heading: Absolutely satisfied with faculty, infrastructure and placement activity.
reviews.review_text: University provides us best facilities in every possible way. The campus is very huge and hostel rooms are also good. Here we get 24x7 Wi-Fi, water and electricity. Mess served us good quality food and menu gets changed everyday. Talking about infrastructure of department we get facilitated by I. C. T tools, Wi-Fi is available in labs and libraries. For medical facilities we are having here homeopathy, ayurveda and allopathy hospitals.

reviews.review_heading: Overall, our university is good.
reviews.review_text: Overall, the infrastructure and facilities provided here are good. Our college provides 24x7 Wi-Fi facility on the campus, hostels and classrooms. The campus is eco-friendly, and the infrastructure is maintained by considering green, clean, happiness protocol. There are well-structured classrooms and libraries. E-library is provided to enhance education. The food is served for 4 times with a perfect diet, and special food is provided on weekends. There are 24x7 medical facilities. Sports and cul...

reviews.review_heading: Our college is among 10 topmost colleges.
reviews.review_text: The college is situated in the heart of the city. Jaipur is a  natural choice and preferred destination for students from different parts of the country to pursue professional educations. Separate hostel facilities are provided for girls on the campus. It has adequate high security and good discipline.

reviews.review_heading: Satisfied with the facilities and infrastructure. Teaching facilities are good.
reviews.review_text: Facilities and infrastructure available for our department are well-equipped. Computer labs are categorised into ERP labs, DBMS lab, etc. There are ICT classrooms and lecture halls. There is a library with computer facilities and there is a server room.  Quality of facilities in our hostel is good. There is a laundary facility, 24x7 internet facility, night attendance at respective hostels and also time to time cleaning for both rooms and washrooms. Quality of food available in the mess and cant...

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with the facilities, infrastructure, and good placements.
reviews.review_text: The college provides facilities like Wi-Fi facility in labs, ICT in the classrooms, library with technical facilities, ICT in the lecture halls and server room. Facilities like air-conditioned rooms, ducting rooms, attached and non-attached washrooms, Wi-Fi and LAN facilities 24x7, night attendance and time to time cleaning by the staffs are available in the hostel. Quality of food served to the students is good. Medical facilities are 24x7 available with an ambulance. The college provides a tea...

reviews.review_heading: Faculties were good, hostel facility was the best as the mess food was tasty.
reviews.review_text:
Facilities were good like hostel classrooms library medical sports and games. Campus was good overall 
Also there was facility of bank inside the campus and also discotheque and gym for entertainment purpose. Overall everything was good. Music room was there and teachers for every field like sports teacher and gym.

reviews.review_heading: Jayoti Vidhyapeeth Women's University is very good for girls.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is very good. All the facilities are available in our college. Wi-Fi facilities are available. Labs are very good. Classrooms have projectors. Medical facilities are available as they are very important. Games and sports classes are conducted every day.

reviews.review_heading: The college life is a mixture of fun and studies.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college is too good. The college provides high-speed Wi-Fi and smart classrooms. There are a well-furnished library, sports ground, game centre, etc. The university provides all kind of facilities. Labs are well-equipped. The campus has a huge playground and a lawn. Everything is good here, but the food served in the canteen is a little expensive. I suggest the college to focus on food prices.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best private women's university in India. The campus is great.
reviews.review_text: The university provides the best facilities to the students in every way. The campus is very huge, and hostel rooms are spacious. Wi-Fi facilities are provided 24x7 in hostel rooms. Mess facilities are also provided for hostellers. The quality of the food served is good. The menu is changed every week. All residential facilities are provided on the campus.

reviews.review_heading: A safe and disciplined women's university for girls.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of the college was good. The university will provide all the required facilities. The whole campus was Wi-Fi enabled. The university provides proper sports and medical facilities. Classrooms and labs were good, but the quality of labs needs some improvement. Hostel rooms, mess and canteen facilities were also good.

reviews.review_heading: Indeed, the best experience. All facilities are provided under one roof.
reviews.review_text: The campus has different buildings for engineering, law and medicine. The campus is lush green. There are swings to enjoy. Playgrounds and cafeterias are available in the college. The best part is the hostel which is present on the campus. It is the safest place.

review_summarisation.heading: What students say about Jayoti Vidyapeeth Women's University

college_info.college_name: Ecole Intuit Lab Delhi: Courses, Fees, Admission 2026, Placements

highlights.summary:
It is a private autonomous institute located in New Delhi. The Institute offers UG in Visual Communication and Digital Design, Digital Product Design, Game Art and Design. It offers PG in Advertising, Design and Digital Communication. École Intuit Lab India is home to three of the seven campuses of École Intuit Lab, a French Institute of Design, Digital and Strategy. It was co-founded in 2001 by Patrick Felices, Clément Derock and Frederic Lalande.

The three campuses in India are located in Mumbai, Kolkata and New Delhi. The institute provides all basic facilities to students, including wi-fi enabled campus, a cafeteria, air-conditioned classrooms and a library.

École Intuit Lab New Delhi highlights are mentioned below:

École Intuit Lab New Delhi offers UG and PG programmes. It offers four UG programmes and one PG programme. The duration of UG programmes is four years and PG programme is 18 months. The details related to École Intuit Lab New Delhi courses and fees are mentioned below:

Note: The above fee is inclusive of GST.

École Intuit Lab New Delhi provides scholarships to meritorious students. The Institute awards 50 per cent tuition fee waiver to eligible students. École Intuit Lab New Delhi also offers need-based scholarships to deserving candidates.

review_content.Placements: EIL has a vast network, given that all faculty are working professionals. This easily leads to internship and career opportunities, such as the two-month compulsory summer internship between the 2nd and 3rd years.
review_content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is pretty good, including the software and the CAD lab. High-end PCs are available for work, and a gaming room may be added soon. For recreation, there are games like table tennis and foosball. There is a canteen and vending machines for food.
review_content.Faculty: The course provides a well-rounded experience, starting with the basics and moving on to specializations. It also offers modules that may not seem directly relevant but provide diverse learning and skill development.

individual_reviews.course: Game Art and Design - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: EIL Delhi, A General Gist.

content.Placements: EIL has a vast network, given that all faculty are working professionals. This easily leads to internship and career opportunities, such as the two-month compulsory summer internship between the 2nd and 3rd years.
content.Infrastructure: The infrastructure is pretty good, including the software and the CAD lab. High-end PCs are available for work, and a gaming room may be added soon. For recreation, there are games like table tennis and foosball. There is a canteen and vending machines for food.
content.Faculty: The course provides a well-rounded experience, starting with the basics and moving on to specializations. It also offers modules that may not seem directly relevant but provide diverse learning and skill development.

The institute offers courses at UG, After 10th and Certificate levels in several specialisations.International Institute of Fine Arts (IIFA, Ghaziabad)offers B.A. and BFA at UG level and After 10th Diploma at the After 10th level.

While core subjects and fundamental concepts might be similar, the structure, electives offered, and laboratory and project work are different.You can check the detailed syllabus for the course on the respective college websites that you're targeting to get a clearer picture.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Electronics Engineering syllabus same across all colleges?

faqs.answer: The clear answer is no. The syllabus for MTech in Computer Science Engineering varies from one college to another. Every college abides by a certain coursework guideline decided by the college committee at the beginning of the academic year. faqs.question: Q: How can I get a seat at SAGE University powered by Sunstone (Indore)?

faqs.answer: Admissions for MBA, BBA, BCA, MCA, and BTech courses at SAGE University powered by Sunstone got started on Jan 1, 2024 and the last date to apply is July 30, 2024. Follow the steps to apply for admission to various courses at Sunstone: SAGE University Indore. The first step is to visit the official website and apply for admission to various undergraduate and postgraduate courses. The next step is to appear for the Sunstone Screening round which includes tests and interviews. The next step is to upload various supporting documents for the review of the application. The last step is to accept the SAGE University powered by Sunstone admission offer.
faqs.question: Q: How can students get admission to various courses at SAGE University powered by Sunstone?

faqs.answer: No, candidates who are looking for BBA course admission at SAGE University powered by Sunstone (Indore) must pass Sunstone Screening ( Test & Interview). For BBA course admission, candidates must meet the eligibility criteria set by the university. Aspiarnts should pass Class 12 with 50% aggregate (reserved category-45% aggregate). The admission criteria for the course is entrance-based.
faqs.question: Q: Can I get direct admission to BBA at SAGE University powered by Sunstone (Indore)?

faqs.answer: For admission to BBA course at SAGE University powered by Sunstone (Indore), students need to fulfil the minimum eligibility criteria in the first place. The selection criteria for this course are merit-based and candidates must pass Class 12 (common eligibility) minimum 50% aggregate. Aspirants who belong to the ST/SC category should complete graduation with a 45% aggregate. Candidates who have not completed graduation are not eligible for admission.
faqs.question: Q: Is there any entrance exam for admission to BBA at SAGE University powered by Sunstone (Indore)?

individual_reviews.title: I'm satisfied with faculty members and management.

content.Placements: Faculty members are nice and supportive with academics as well as placement and internship guidance. Top recruiting companies are Infosys, Tata, etc. Internships and placements are based on attendance as well. There is a 100% placement guarantee if our attendance is more than 75% each semester.
content.Infrastructure: Library is above average. Canteen is very small in our department, it's better in Computer Science department. Hostels are average, they have a curfew after 8:00 PM. Food is also average in the canteen, mess food is somewhat better. Infrastructure is good.
