individual_reviews.title: Sunstone Eduversity (SAGE) is the best in all attributes.

content.Placements: Sunstone Eduversity has dedicated placement team members who work round the clock to get me and my fellow batchmates placed. The placement system is in such a way that I could attend interviews in companies in which I was interested. Even I got job offers from 2 out of 3 companies. I am thankful to Sunstone for building my career to have success.

The campus is well facilitated with labs, a 24x7 library, air-conditioners, hostel, transport and everything which students could need in MBA.

placement_report.college_name: SAGE University powered by Sunstone (Indore) Placements 2025: Highest Package, Average Package, Top Companies

placement_data.title: SAGE University Powered by Sunstone (Indore) Placement Overview 2025
paragraphs: SAGE University powered by Sunstone (Indore), trains its students for a variety of job profiles through more than 100 hours of job-focused boot camps. To ensure that the placement-centric sessions are completed successfully, the University's placement team also monitors the dynamic changes occurring globally.

As per the latest report, the highest and average package offered during SAGE University Powered by Sunstone placements in 2025 stood at INR 26 LPA and INR 4.6 LPA, respectively. More than 1,200 companies visited the campus in 2025 and provided jobs in over 50 domains . The top recruiters of SAGE University Powered by Sunstone (Indore) in 2025 included Nestle, Amul, Paytm, SBI General, Axis Bank, Muthoot Finance, HDFC Life, Coca-Cola, Zomato, Grow, Wipro, Paisabazar, and many more. In 2025, the ROI was 63% higher.

Sunstone’s Placement Opportunity Program (POP) offers students access to 200+ assured placement opportunities, or a refund of their first-year tuition fee if placements don’t meet the commitment. To be eligible for POP, students must maintain a minimum average attendance of 70% across all credit and non-credit classes in every semester. They are also required to clear all examinations with a minimum score of 80% or equivalent CGPA, and must not have any backlogs. In addition, students must ensure that all fee payments are made as per the timeline outlined in the offer letter. Lastly, students must strictly adhere to the Sunstone Placement Policy Guidelines throughout the program

reviews.review_heading: I'm satisfied with faculty members and management.
reviews.review_text: Library is above average. Canteen is very small in our department, it's better in Computer Science department. Hostels are average, they have a curfew after 8:00 PM. Food is also average in the canteen, mess food is somewhat better. Infrastructure is good.

reviews.review_heading: I am satisfied with my college.
reviews.review_text: The food is good. The infrastructure is 10/10. Facilities in the hostel are very good. The hostel provides medical support. The hostel is clean and has a good environment. There are amazing students. There is parental support. All facilities are available in hostels.

reviews.review_heading: The academic experience at Sunstone and State University of Indore is decent.
reviews.review_text: Library is decent with relevant books available for each course. Our college has a different building for each course and a separate floor for Sunstone. Quality of food is average. Medical facilities and sports and games are below average. Infrastructure is huge. There are dedicated libraries for each course.

reviews.review_heading: Sunstone Eduversity (SAGE) is the best in all attributes.
reviews.review_text: SAGE, Indore, has an amazing campus with green surroundings and vast spaces. There is a cafeteria to hang out and spend time relaxing. The campus is well facilitated with labs, a 24x7 library, air-conditioners, hostel, transport and everything which students could need in MBA.

reviews_list.review_title: The labs are really big.

review_content.Placements: Almost 90% of all the students from various batches have got their placements in companies like Deloitte, Infosys, Tata, Blinkit, and many legal firms. They provide a good internship stipend starting from Rs. 10,000, and there are many courses to join.
review_content.Infrastructure: There is Wi-Fi facility in the hostel, 24-hour hot water, and fresh drinking water. There is an option of shared rooms and separate rooms for individual accommodation. Hostel food is good. Classrooms are big and spacious and can accommodate a good number of students. There are labs with built-in AC and many conference rooms in them also.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Really good infrastructure and facilities.

review_content.Placements: The college is new, so there is not more information about placement. The placements will start in 2026 for the first batch, but the college is providing internships right now, so it is not about placements here; it is more about how you build employment for others, future leaders.
review_content.Infrastructure: The college infrastructure is top notch with lecture halls, a good, vibrant campus, which has Makerspace for students, a computer lab, and also has infrastructure for research labs. The college hostel also has top-class facilities, but it is a bit expensive, so make note of that.

reviews_list.batch_info: B.Tech. (Hons.) in Computer Science and Engineering (Data Science) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: Easy to get in, small campus, great professors, scholarship opportunities, hard to get a high CGPA.

review_content.Placements: Almost any student that pays full tuition is admitted. Other students who have been admitted are from rural areas here on scholarship or who entered through CET exams. From what the CET batch says, it's not too hard to get in. The average tuition is around 5 Lacs per year. Internships are mandated and are streamlined through the college. Companies like MuSigma and Deloitte are common places where B.Tech students get placed. Around 30% of students get internships through the college (the rest don't apply).
review_content.Infrastructure: There is no hostel and there won't be one on this campus. The food is expensive but is nutritious and tastes good. There are issues with the Wi-Fi, and there is a lack of seating sometimes. Classrooms get packed and congested. We have a great library with wide-spaced study areas as well. They include public desktops (DELL and Apple). There are plenty of sports activities, inter-college activities, and weekly games at the VSA campus. We have an infirmary on site with a full-time nurse.

paragraphs: Vidyashilp University offers undergraduate and postgraduate programs such as BTech (Hons), BA (Hons), BA (Hons.) with Research, BMS (Hons), BMS (Hons with Research), and others.Vidyashilp Universityoffers these courses for new-age streams like Data Science, Digital Business, Communication Design, Decision Science, and Start-up Management. Admission to all the courses is interview and entrance-based. Applicants looking for admission can apply online through the university's official website. The university also offers PhD courses. To know more about the Vidyashilp University admission process along with course eligibility and selection criteria, go through the below segments:

Vidyashilp University admission 2025is a mix of merit or entrance-based as per course requirement. The university offers eight courses in various streams such as Design, Engineering, etc. The mode of study of the programme is full-time. Check out the following table for details aboutVidyashilp University course admissions2025:

Vidyashilp University Bengaluru admission to courses is both merit or entrance-based. Entrance exams accepted by the University are JEE Main, NID DAT and UCEED. The final selection is based on a candidate's performance in theentranceandPersonal Interview (PI)round conducted by the University.The details related to Vidyashilp University coursesare mentioned below:

Admission to Vidyashilp University is based on the candidate's evaluation. The admission process for Vidyashilp University is a multi-step process inclusive of application, appearance in the selection rounds, online admission process, and document verification. Check below the step-by-stepVidyashilp University admission process 2025:
Step 1:Vidyashilp University Application Process 2025

The eligible candidates need to apply online on the official website of Vidyashilp University. It must be noted that the eligible candidates must have completed theentrance examformalities & must have qualified the eligibility criteria for their respective courses before applying to the University.
Step 2: Sanjivani University Selection Process 2025

Admission to the courses is bothinterviewandentrance-based. The institute has a predefined selection process for shortlisting aspirants. The selection process includes an entrance exam for admission to BTech, BA, BMS and others. Further, for other courses university offers admission based on the PI round.
Step 3: Admission Confirmation
After candidates get shortlisted, they need to come for the document verification. Selected candidates need to payVidyashilp University feesto confirm their admission.

faqs.question: How expensive is BTech at Vidyashilp University?
faqs.answer: At the UG level, Vidyashilp University offers BTech courses to students. The fee for the BTech course at Vidyashilp University includes various components including tuition fee and registration fee. The tuition fee of BTech is INR 5 lakh per year and INR 20.1 lakh in total. andidates who want admission to Vidyashilp University can visit the official website to register for admission.

courses_data.name: Vidyashilp University BA LLB Admission 2025
courses_data.description: Vidyashilp University offers a five-year integrated BA LLB (Hons) course spread across 10 semesters. Aspirants who have completed Class 10 and Class 12 with a minimum of 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category) can apply for the course. The university considers the CLAT/LSAT/AILET scores of the candidates for admission. Further, the final seat is allotted based on performance in the Personal interview round conducted by the university. faqs.question: What is the seat intake for B.A LL.B (Hons) at Vidyashilp University?
faqs.answer: There are over 60 seats in BA LLB (Hons) course of Vidyashilp University. Candidates are offered seat in the course based on various entrance exam scores, such as CLAT/LSAT/AILET. To get admisison candidates are required to apply and appear in one entrance exam accepted by the university. Further, candidates must appear in PI round conducted by the university for final seat allotment.

faqs.question: Is BA LLB offered at Vidyashilp University?
faqs.answer: Yes, Vidyashilp University offers five-year BALLB course at the UG level. A total of 60 courses are offered at Vidyashilp University. Candidates looking for admission to BA LLB must have Class 10 and Class 12 with a minimum of 45% aggregate (40% for reserved category). Further, candidates must appear and score well in the exam accepted by the university such as CLAT/LSAT/AILET, followe by PI round.

faqs.question: Can I get direct admission to Vidyashilp University?
faqs.answer: Vidyashilp University offers entrance and interview-based admission to all its courses, such as BTech, BA, BDes, BMS, and others. Applicants seeking admission to any of these courses must appear for various entrance exams which includes JEE Main, CLAT, LSAT/AILET and others followed by Personal interview conducted by Vidyashilp University.

faqs.question: How to get admission to integrated LLB programme at Vidyashilp University?
faqs.answer: Vidyashilp Univeristy offers two integrated LLB programmes as BA LLB & BBA LLB. The admission to both the programmes is based on the entrance exam score of candidates. reviews.review_heading: The labs are really big.
reviews.review_text: There is Wi-Fi facility in the hostel, 24-hour hot water, and fresh drinking water. There is an option of shared rooms and separate rooms for individual accommodation. Hostel food is good. Classrooms are big and spacious and can accommodate a good number of students. There are labs with built-in AC and many conference rooms in them also.

reviews.review_heading: Really good infrastructure and facilities.
reviews.review_text: The college infrastructure is top notch with lecture halls, a good, vibrant campus, which has Makerspace for students, a computer lab, and also has infrastructure for research labs. The college hostel also has top-class facilities, but it is a bit expensive, so make note of that.

reviews.review_heading: Easy to get in, small campus, great professors, scholarship opportunities, hard to get a high CGPA.
reviews.review_text: There is no hostel and there won't be one on this campus. The food is expensive but is nutritious and tastes good. There are issues with the Wi-Fi, and there is a lack of seating sometimes. Classrooms get packed and congested. We have a great library with wide-spaced study areas as well. They include public desktops (DELL and Apple). There are plenty of sports activities, inter-college activities, and weekly games at the VSA campus. We have an infirmary on site with a full-time nurse.

paragraphs: Vidyashilp University provides various scholarships to the students. The details regarding Vidyashilp University are mentioned below:
Enabling Scholarship: To enable meritorious students who may havefinancial constraints to pursue education at Vidyashilp University.
Encouragement Scholarship: This scholarship is provided to encourage high-achieving all-rounders and differently-abled students to pursue education.
Merit Scholarship: To reward students with outstanding academic performance. This scholarship is awarded at the time of admission to the 1st year of an academic program
Academic Performance Scholarship: To reward Vidyashilp University students for their academic performance during the programme, i.e. from 2nd year onwards

faqs.answer: The BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus is not the same across all colleges, as every college committee sets a particular coursework pattern at the start of every academic year to be followed for the respective batch. The syllabus includes some core subjects, interesting electives, and lab work that gives detailed knowledge to the students about the workings of the field.
faqs.question: Q: Is the BTech Mechanical Engineering syllabus the same for all colleges?

faqs.answer: The syllabus for the B Tech EE course focuses on both aspects because they are equally important for you to do well at the workplace in the future. There are theory classes to make you understand the meaning and workings of the Electrical Engineering concepts, and practical lab work and industrial training to give you a glimpse of the real-world applications.Know more about -Electrical Engineering Courses
faqs.question: Q: Does the BTech Electrical Engineering syllabus focus more on theory or practical application?

faqs.answer: Dear candidate, the subject of Machine Design basically teaches you about the designing fundamentals of various types of machinery across industries. You get to learn about the different ways in which elements can be combined to form an equipment or machine system and get the work done in an effective manner.The knowledge of this subject is very important for a mechanical engineer as he/she will have to put this to use in the future whenever they enter the workforce as a mechanical engineering professional.Hope this cleared your doubt. Have a good day.
faqs.question: Q: What is covered in Machine Design subject in B.Tech course?

faqs.answer: The BTech Civil Engineering syllabus focuses on both theoretical lectures as well as practical work.With the help of lectures in the curriculum, theoretical concepts are introduced to students, tutorials provide space for solving problems and applications also.And the labs offer hands-on experience to students who get acquainted with equipment and CAD software. Also, the field projects also allow students to apply their B Tech Civil Engg. skills and knowledge to design and implement communication systems.

answer.text: If we look at the market demand, no doubt there is huge demand for BTech (Full Form: Bachelor of Technology) graduates among top recruiters who are constantly looking for skilled and knowledgeable students with fresh ideas to enhance their business growth and profitability.Having said that, a few previous-year employment reports published by the Business Standard and Times of India suggest that students found it a struggle to land a high-paying job after completing BTech because of a lack of industry-specific skills and knowledge and cut-throat competition between Lacs of engineering students hunting for a job.Hence, it is very important for students to focus on enhancing their skill set according to industrial demands and technological advancements, stay updated regarding all industry trends, build good networks and, most importantly, take up internships to gain experience and stand out in front of the employer.Read more: B Tech Jobs in India

highlights.summary: The TANCET 2026 application form is live until Apr 10, 2026, for D D Goverdhan Doss Vaishnav College admission to the MBA course. Also, the TANCET exam 2026 is scheduled for May 9, 2026.

reviews_list.review_title: DGVC is a student's point of view.

review_content.Placements: The placement percentage is always around 60-70%, with various Chennai-based and South Indian companies like Sun TV, Vijay TV, and other well-known companies as recruiting partners. Around 70% of students secure internships, and the roles vary based on the career path each student chooses to pursue.
review_content.Infrastructure: Every necessary facility and infrastructure is available here, from well-equipped classrooms to industry-level professional studios and labs for hands-on learning. The college also provides hostel accommodation, and the food in the canteen is healthy. Students are given ample opportunities to participate in sports and games.

reviews_list.batch_info: M.Sc. in Chemistry - Batch of 2025
reviews_list.review_title: Above Average College for M.Sc. in Chemistry.

review_content.Placements: A placement cell at our Dwaraka Doss Goverdhan Doss Vaishnav College offers 80% above placement. How much we put into our studies to obtain jobs determines where we end up. Prominent corporations include Amazon, TCS, Wipro, and others. Starting at 4.5 LPA, the highest remuneration package ranges from 14.5 to 15.5 LPA. Fifty percent of students secure internships.
review_content.Infrastructure: We appreciate our campus environment because of the pleasant college atmosphere, which also aids in our ability to concentrate on our studies. High-speed internet and the newest equipment are available in lab rooms. Every year, a festival is organized on the campus of our college. We have to pay for the great food at the canteen.

reviews_list.batch_info: Bachelor of Commerce (B.Com.) - Batch of 2027
reviews_list.review_title: 1st year B.Com marketing management .

review_content.Placements: Even though I'm currently in my first year, I've seen my seniors already preparing for placements. The college provides various training programs to help them get selected by top companies and conducts many workshops. They emphasize the importance of placements from the first year itself, and internships are provided in the second year.
review_content.Infrastructure: My college isn't very big, but it's clean and neat. There are two cafeterias, and the college is always crowded in the afternoon after classes end. Even the bus stop gets crowded. We have a large bike parking area. The hostel facility is only for boys, and they don't serve any non-vegetarian food.

individual_reviews.course: Master of Business Administration (MBA) - Batch of 2026
individual_reviews.title: Good MBA environment with good growth and experience.

content.Placements: In my MBA 2024, 2026 batch, the placement activities have been progressing steadily, and a good number of students have already received interview calls, and shortlisted companies like Assetplue, Accenture, TCS, HDFC, and EY have visited the campus offering roles in HR, finance and marketing. The highest package offer so far is around 8 to 10 Lacs, and the average package remains close to 4 Lacs to 5 Lacs.
content.Infrastructure: The college provides a comfortable academic environment with a smart classroom, strong Wi-Fi, a clean lab, and a well-stocked library that is useful for project work. The campus is neat, and most facilities are updated regularly. The hostel has proper security, decent rooms and regular cleaning.

individual_reviews.course: M.Sc. in Chemistry - Batch of 2025
individual_reviews.title: Overall best College for M.Sc. In Chemistry Course.

content.Placements: Recruitment is good and growing at our university. More than 75-85% of students are referred to the campus placement drives. The highest salary offered was 25 LPA. The top roles are financial analyst, economic analyst, etc. 70% of students get internship opportunities.
content.Infrastructure: Our campus is fully equipped, and the view from campus is spectacular. There are thick trees all across campus, and it is cool. Classrooms provide air conditioning, laboratories, Wi-Fi, and smart boards. Everything is operated and maintained. They are friendly. Clinics are also available on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: Good MBA environment with good growth and experience.
reviews.review_text: The college provides a comfortable academic environment with a smart classroom, strong Wi-Fi, a clean lab, and a well-stocked library that is useful for project work. The campus is neat, and most facilities are updated regularly. The hostel has proper security, decent rooms and regular cleaning.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for M.Sc. In Chemistry Course.
reviews.review_text: Our campus is fully equipped, and the view from campus is spectacular. There are thick trees all across campus, and it is cool. Classrooms provide air conditioning, laboratories, Wi-Fi, and smart boards. Everything is operated and maintained. They are friendly. Clinics are also available on our campus.

reviews.review_heading: DGVC is a student's point of view.
reviews.review_text: Every necessary facility and infrastructure is available here, from well-equipped classrooms to industry-level professional studios and labs for hands-on learning. The college also provides hostel accommodation, and the food in the canteen is healthy. Students are given ample opportunities to participate in sports and games.

reviews.review_heading: Above Average College for M.Sc. in Chemistry.
reviews.review_text: We appreciate our campus environment because of the pleasant college atmosphere, which also aids in our ability to concentrate on our studies. High-speed internet and the newest equipment are available in lab rooms. Every year, a festival is organized on the campus of our college. We have to pay for the great food at the canteen.

reviews.review_heading: 1st year B.Com marketing management .
reviews.review_text: My college isn't very big, but it's clean and neat. There are two cafeterias, and the college is always crowded in the afternoon after classes end. Even the bus stop gets crowded.  We have a large bike parking area. The hostel facility is only for boys, and they don't serve any non-vegetarian food.

reviews.review_heading: Lots of culturals to attend and no restriction.
reviews.review_text: Top-class labs and classrooms. There is no free Wi-Fi, and the library is the best. In the hostel, there is no A/C, but rooms are good. There is no A/C option in the hostel. It can get very hot, and the food is vegetarian. There is no non-veg allowed on campus due to the college principles.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for Master of Commerce (M.Com.) Course.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure is awesome with greenery, which gives us positive vibes while entering college. Our college provides a good environment. Classrooms, libraries and E-libraries are also available for information. Our college has provided us with clean and hygienic food. Hostel room is good due to maintenance which is great in our college.

reviews.review_heading: Overall best College for M.A. in Journalism Course.
reviews.review_text: Our college infrastructure, facilities are good. Our college gives us everything. Our campus has been well maintained. The bathrooms are good. The library is good. It has a lot of books. The food served in the restaurant is good, clean, and healthy. The restaurant is well maintained. Our college has facilities for sports such as basketball, kho-kho, and volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: Best college for M.Sc. I am happy with it.
reviews.review_text: Infrastructure is good and our college is very strict; no one can enter without an ID card. All lab rooms have AC. There is a huge amount of literature available in our college library. Tasty food, medical facilities, and many other things are available. Sports and functions are arranged every year.

reviews.review_heading: Good college and we love it here.
reviews.review_text: The college atmosphere is nice, which is why we enjoy our campus environment, and it helps us focus on our studies. Lab rooms are available with the latest technology and high-speed internet. An annual fest is arranged every year on our college grounds. The canteen's food is delicious, but we have to pay for it.

reviews.review_heading: It is the best college in the state.
reviews.review_text: The college environment is very nice; our full campus area is covered with so many trees and plants. Classrooms and rest rooms are very neat and clean. Lab rooms are projector-connected. full coverage area is under Wi-fi coverage. There is a large playground in there. Overall, the college provides all types of facilities like library, medical center, canteen, etc.

reviews.review_heading: My college faculty is good .
reviews.review_text: Our college boasts comprehensive facilities, including Wi-Fi, labs, a library, a ground and hostel accommodation. Medical services are all well maintained in these facilities. The canteen provides food and hygiene for all students and my college has special Sunday meals available .

reviews.review_heading: Review of D D Goverdhan Doss Vaishnav College.
reviews.review_text: The infrastructure of our college is good. Our college provides us with all facilities. Our campus is well-maintained. The restrooms are good. The library is good. It has many books. The food served in the canteen is good, hygienic, and healthy. The canteen is well-maintained. Our college provides facilities for sports like basketball, kho-kho, and volleyball.

reviews.review_heading: I was dissatisfied two years ago, but now the college has developed and earned my respect.
reviews.review_text: The college contains labs, Wi-Fi, a big library, and a play ground with many auditoriums in each block. There are hostel facilities, a mess, and a canteen too. There is a separate auditorium for each department, and it has many indoor games and full medical facilities.

reviews.review_heading: Review of D D Goverdhan Doss Vaishnav College.
reviews.review_text: Our college provides us with all facilities. Our college is Wi-Fi enabled. Our college has labs, a library, etc. A sports ground is available in our college. The hostel facility is available in our college. Medical facilities are available in our college. They provide sports facilities. A huge canteen is available in our college. The food served in the mess is good.

paragraphs: National Institute of Management and Technology, Jaipur admissions are based on merit. The institute considers applications of candidates meeting the eligibility criteria.National Institute of Management and Technology, Jaipuroffers courses at UG and PG levels. Some of the courses include B.Sc., B.Ed and MBA/PGDM. Candidates can apply online for the preferred course.
The total tuition fees for UG courses isINR 54,000 - 3,85,000. Aspirants may also need to pay one-time caution deposit at the time of admission.
The institute offers UG courses for 2 years - 4 years. PG courses are offered for 2 years.
